name: leia
description: AI-first intent specification language tooling for Leia .leia files.

scripts.build:editor: npm --prefix packages/leia-language-server run build && npm --prefix packages/leia-vscode run build
scripts.check:editor: npm --prefix packages/leia-language-server run check && npm --prefix packages/leia-vscode run check
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/test/parser.test.js && node dist/test/validator.test.js && node dist/test/formatter.test.js && node dist/test/completion.test.js && node dist/test/lsp.test.js && node dist/test/prompt.test.js && node dist/test/handoff.test.js && node dist/test/cli.test.js && node dist/test/python-harness.test.js
